fabrics.name: Gilded Gold Swiss Voile Lace
fabrics.description: Intricately embroidered premium Swiss voile lace adorned with gold-threaded floral motifs and subtle sequin highlights. Ideal for Nigerian traditional weddings (Owambe) and luxury custom garments.

fabrics.name: Classic Vlisco Ankara (Vintage Sunburst)
fabrics.description: Genuine luxury grade Vlisco wax print, 100% fine cotton. Features premium heritage African motifs with rich, lightfast saturation that holds its structural form perfectly for traditional Senator, Kaftan, or custom gowns.

fabrics.name: Handwoven Metallic Aso Oke (Luxe Thread)
fabrics.description: Masterfully hand-loomed traditional Yoruba fabric interwoven with premium metallic lurex threads for an unmatched royal reflection. Ideal for majestic caps, geles, sashes, and luxury custom Agbada sets.

fabrics.name: Royal Damask Brocade (Imperial Silk)
fabrics.description: Heavyweight, luxurious jacquard-weave silk brocade featuring sophisticated regal damask patterns. Tailors beautifully into structured traditional men's Kaftans and corporate evening wears.

fabrics.name: Elysian Mulberry Silk (Heavy Satin)
fabrics.description: Ultra-fluid 100% pure organic mulberry silk satin. Possesses a glossy, luminous outer finish and a liquid-soft touch that skims the silhouette elegantly, perfect for bridal reception gowns and luxury boubou styles.

fabrics.name: Midnight Velvet Crush (Luxury Stretch)
fabrics.description: Thick plush pile velvet with a rich multi-toned deep crush effect. Supple, comfortable stretch, excellent for opulent evening gowns, traditional wrappers, or custom embroidery accents.

fabrics.name: Super 140s Italian Cashmere Wool
fabrics.description: Exquisite, lightweight superfine wool mixed with high-grade Italian cashmere fibers. Highly breathable, soft, and designed specifically for bespoke Senator wear, high-end Kaftans, and traditional executive styles.

gallery.title: The Majestic Royal Agbada Set
gallery.description: A breathtaking 4-piece traditional Nigerian Agbada tailored in hand-loomed Royal Aso Oke. Features geometric hand-embroidered patterns in metallic gold thread.

gallery.title: Imperial Damask Kaftan with Crest
gallery.description: An elegant, structurally tailored ivory and navy senator outfit. Designed using luxury Italian cashmere and features a minimalist modern embroidered breast seal.

gallery.title: Gilded Ivory Mermaid Lace Gown
gallery.description: Stunning custom wedding gown designed in double-lined Swiss voile lace. Tailored to perfection with a hand-stitched beaded corset bodice and trailing train.

gallery.title: Vibrant Ankara Ruffled Ballgown
gallery.description: High-contrast tiered children's party gown designed with combined vintage sunburst Ankara and soft satin underlays.

gallery.title: Contemporary Adire Resort Jumpsuit
gallery.description: Lightweight, fluid casual wear designed in premium indigo-dyed adire cotton. High-waisted belt design suited for everyday luxury.

gallery.title: Classic Bespoke Corporate Suit
gallery.description: Sharp corporate menswear piece tailored with Italian superfine cashmere wool, featuring structured lapels and customized inner satin lining.

gallery.title: Bridal Reception Lace Wrap Dress
gallery.description: Luxurious reception dress for brides, combining fluid Elysian mulberry silk draping and premium French embroidered lace accents.

styles.name: The Majestic Agbada (4-Piece Outfit)
styles.description: A supreme traditional attire representing power and heritage, featuring the large flowing agbada gown, matching long sleeve kaftan, tapered trousers, and standard embroidered cap.

styles.name: Corset Mermaid Lace Silhouette
styles.description: A tailored-to-fit evening and wedding design. Built on a sturdy boned corset foundation, cascading into a sweeping flare that highlights the fabrics' lace pattern beautifully.

styles.name: Minimalist Senator Suit
styles.description: A sleek modern African formal alternative. Structured collar, dynamic custom embroidery or contrast piping, complete with tailored straight-cut trousers.

styles.name: Premium Buba & Iro Wrapper Set
styles.description: Classic Yoruba traditional elegance. Beautifully draped long sleeve top (Buba) paired with a wrapper skirt (Iro) and matching shoulder sash (Ipele). Highlighted by custom lace or Aso Oke border.
